channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James became the first player in NBA history to score 50,000 combined points in the regular season and postseason Tuesday night. James surpassed the mark with a 3-pointer early in the first quarter of the Los Angeles Lakers' game against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Roki Sasaki pitches 3 scoreless innings in his spring debut with the Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Roki Sasaki pitched three scoreless innings for the Los Angeles Dodgers in his spring training debut against the Cincinnati Reds on Tuesday night. Sasaki allowed two hits, struck out five and walked one. The right-hander threw 46 pitches, 26 for strikes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Indiana governor bans trans athletes in women's sports, honors SJSU athlete who alleges lost scholarship
item.description: Indiana Gov. Mike Braun signed an executive order to prevent trans athletes from competing in women's college sports and honored an athlete who lost out on a scholarship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Times Square boxing event in May promises to be big, with 3 fights and talk of half a million fans
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Big boxing in New York for long meant Madison Square Garden, in recent years Barclays Center as well. Fight night in Times Square promises to be a whole different scene.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: California college faces backlash for replacing men's, women's locker rooms with all-sex locker rooms
item.description: UC Davis has announced plans to convert its men's and women's locker rooms at recreation centers into “universal" all-sex locker rooms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets part ways with Davante Adams after less than one season: report
item.description: The Jets decision to release Davante Adams will result in salary cap savings. The star receiver can sign with another NFL team once he officially enters the free agent market.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets release wide receiver Davante Adams as new regime continues roster overhaul
item.description: Davante Adams’ reunion with Aaron Rodgers lasted just 11 games with the New York Jets. The team released the veteran wide receiver Tuesday, ahead of the start of the NFL’s new league year next week. The move, which was expected, will save the Jets $29.9 million in salary cap space.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Darius Slay's wife shares heartbreaking message after Eagles cut him to save money for free agency
item.description: Jennifer Slay, the wife of cornerback Darius Slay, posted a heartbreaking message on social media after the Philadelphia Eagles released him to save money against their cap.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Attorneys in college sports lawsuit point to 'intergalactic paradigm shift' for NCAA
item.description: Attorneys seeking approval of the $2.8 billion legal settlement for college sports pointed to nearly 102,000 athletes who signed up to receive damages from the action, while batting down objections to what they described as the “intergalactic paradigm shift” the settlement will create across the NCA
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Darnold pointed toward free agency after Vikings pass on franchise tag with McCarthy waiting
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings will likely let their starting quarterback set the NFL free agent market for a second straight offseason.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles make Saquon Barkley highest-paid running back in NFL history with surprising extension: reports
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have made Saquon Barkley the highest-paid running back in NFL history, reportedly giving him a two-year extension just one year after signing him in free agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL punter applauds Senate Dems after bill to prohibit males from women's sports fails to break filibuster
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe applauded Senate Democrats for halting the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act from moving forward.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Lakers and LeBron are clearly reveling in what the Luka trade did for their title hopes
item.description: The game hasn’t gotten easy for the Los Angeles Lakers since the trade deadline. It just looks that way.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the numbers: LeBron James and his path to 50,000 points in the NBA, including playoffs
item.description: Another milestone awaits LeBron James: 50,000 NBA points. He's one point away from getting to that number, which takes into account his regular season and playoff scoring.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cryer scores 22 points and No. 3 Houston beats Kansas 65-59 for 9th straight win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 22 points and No. 3 Houston won its ninth straight game with a 65-59 victory over Kansas on Monday night. Emanuel Sharp added 12 points off the bench, including two free throws that pushed Houston's lead to 63-59 with 20 seconds left.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 51 as Thunder top Rockets 137-128 for 50th win
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 51 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Houston Rockets 137-128 on Monday night for their 50th win of the season. Gilgeous-Alexander reached 50 points for the fourth time this season, all in the past seven weeks.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Soccer CIF Division III Final: San Diego 2, Mira Mesa 1
item.description: As the 7 seeded San Diego High School Cavers, are your 2025 CIFSDS Division III Champions, the final score 2-1
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Connor Zilisch's 'not smart' moves lead him to victory at Focused Health 250 in Austin
item.description: Zilisch shrugged off early and late trouble to capture the checkered flag in the NASCAR Xfinity Series Focused Health 250 on Saturday at Circuit of the Americas. It's his second career win on NASCAR's second circuit.
item.dc:creator: Grace Reader, Fox 5

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, WGN 9

item.title: Power struggles on 44th birthday as he begins IndyCar season seeking a Penske contract extension
item.description: Will Power had a rough 44th birthday Saturday when he lost power in his car, brushed the wall during practice and had his hybrid engine changed before qualifying for IndyCar’s season-opening race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
